teachers.name: Alex Hoare
teachers.bio: BMus(Hons) from the NZ School of Music. Alex brings years of orchestral and teaching experience to Gallery’s cello programme.

teachers.name: Jane Smith
teachers.bio: An experienced violin teacher with a passion for group instruction and helping young students build a strong foundation in string playing.

teachers.name: Michael Kahu
teachers.bio: A versatile musician who has been teaching guitar and keyboard to young learners for over a decade.

teachers.name: Rachel Lee
teachers.bio: Classically trained flautist with a warm, encouraging teaching style. Rachel loves introducing students to the world of woodwind.

teachers.name: David Torres
teachers.bio: A dynamic percussionist and brass player who keeps Saturday mornings full of energy and rhythm.

teachers.name: Sarah Ngata
teachers.bio: A passionate music educator who specialises in early childhood music, helping our youngest students find their musical voice.
